title: マイルCSの後に・風は冷え心は熱く

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap pulls off an impressive achievement in
the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The preliminary voting results for the Arima Kinen
suggest that both Super Creek and Oguri Cap will
qualify.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them decide to work hard and encourage
one another in preparation for the decisive race.
